query: Samsung Korea partnership Perplexity AI pre-installed phones details

{"query":"Samsung Korea partnership Perplexity AI pre-installed phones details","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1509,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2025-06-01/samsung-nears-wide-ranging-deal-with-perplexity-for-ai-features","title":"Samsung Nears Wide-Ranging Deal With Perplexity for AI Features - Bloomberg","content":"Samsung Electronics Co. is nearing a wide-ranging deal to invest in Perplexity AI Inc. and put search technology from the artificial intelligence startup at the forefront of the South Korean company’s devices.
The two companies are in talks to preload Perplexity’s app and assistant on upcoming Samsung devices and integrate the startup’s search features into the Samsung web browser, according to people with knowledge of the matter."},{"url":"https://www.reuters.com/world/china/samsung-double-mobile-devices-powered-by-googles-gemini-800-mln-units-this-year-2026-01-05/","title":"Samsung to double AI mobile devices to 800 million units this year | Reuters","content":"Samsung's mobile devices with "Galaxy AI" features will double to 800 mln units this year, co-CEO says
The South Korean company, which had rolled out Gemini-backed AI features to about 400 million mobile products, including smartphones and tablets, by last year, plans to boost that figure to 800 million in 2026.
But it faces competition from Chinese companies such as Huawei, as well as Apple, which is expected to launch its first foldable phone this year."},{"url":"https://www.medianama.com/2026/03/223-samsung-perplexity-galaxy-s26-system-level-access-what-this-mean-indian-users/","title":"Samsung Pre-Installs Perplexity AI Agent On Galaxy S26","content":"Samsung Electronics announced on February 21 that Perplexity will come pre-installed on the Galaxy S26 series as a system-level AI agent.
Dmitry Shevelenko, Perplexity’s Chief Business Officer, notes that this partnership signals the end of the “single walled-garden assistant”, explaining that Samsung built the Galaxy S26 from the ground up to support an open ecosystem where different AI models work together at the system level.
In practice, a Perplexity query can automatically save results to Notes, create a reminder mid-conversation, or add an event to Calendar, all without the user switching applications.
Roh told Reuters in January that the company targets 800 million Galaxy AI-enabled devices by end of 2026, double the 400 million it reached in 2025.
Samsung’s announcement, meanwhile, promises only that “additional details about supported devices and experiences will be announced soon”."},{"url":"https://mashable.com/article/samsung-pre-load-perplexity-ai-future-galaxy-smartphones","title":"Samsung could pre-load Perplexity AI on its future Galaxy smartphones | Mashable","content":"According to a report from Bloomberg, Samsung is "nearing a wide-ranging deal" to bring Perplexity search capabilities to the upcoming Galaxy S26 series."},{"url":"https://www.samsung.com/latin_en/mobile/","title":"All about Galaxy | The Latest Samsung Mobile Innovations | Samsung Caribbean","content":"The advanced mobile Digital Natural Image engine (mDNIe) improves image processing precision by 4 times, delivering significantly refined and enhanced image quality with smooth, natural-looking details and gradients.

According to Bloomberg sources familiar with the matter, Perplexity AI is in early talks with Samsung about potential integration options. These include offering Perplexity as an alternative AI assistant, pre-installing the Perplexity app on smartphones, or featuring it prominently in the Galaxy Store. While Samsung talks continue, Lenovo-owned Motorola has already agreed to pre-install Perplexity as an alternative to Google Gemini on upcoming devices. Samsung’s Galaxy S25 Edge is on display during an event at its store in Seoul, South Korea, May 13, 2025. Samsung Electronics is nearing a wide-ranging deal to invest in Perplexity AI and put search technology from the artificial intelligence start-up at the forefront of the South Korean company’s devices. The two companies are in talks to preload Perplexity’s app and assistant on upcoming Samsung devices and integrate the start-up’s search features into the Samsung web browser, according to people with knowledge of the matter. The tech giant is also expected to be one of the biggest investors in a new round of funding for Perplexity, the people said. Samsung’s Galaxy S25 Edge on display at its store in Seoul, South Korea, May 13, 2025.","score":0.7352811,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.zdnet.com/article/perplexity-ai-coming-soon-to-these-samsung-devices-report","title":"Perplexity AI coming soon to these Samsung devices - report | ZDNET","content":"# Perplexity AI coming soon to these Samsung devices - report. Samsung has been offering its mobile customers a robust selection of Galaxy AI features via integration with Google Gemini. A deal with Perplexity AI may soon expand the AI features on Samsung devices. ## Perplexity in Samsung devices. On Sunday, Bloomberg published a report informed by persons close to the matter about a wide-ranging deal between Samsung and AI startup Perplexity AI, which would preload Perplexity's app and assistant on future Samsung devices. Samsung reportedly plans to announce the partnership this year, and users may see the Perplexity integration as soon as the Galaxy S26 lineup, which is expected to launch at Samsung's winter Unpacked event in early 2026, where the goal is for Perplexity to be the default AI assistant. Until now, Samsung has largely relied on Google's AI developments -- including Gemini assistant and the Circle to Search feature -- to power Samsung's own suite of AI features.","score":0.7348247,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://finance.yahoo.com/news/samsung-may-incorporate-perplexitys-ai-124937729.html","title":"Samsung may incorporate Perplexity's AI tech in its phones","content":"Jun 2, 2025","score":0.67885995,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/koreatechtoday_samsung-eyes-perplexity-ai-integration-investment-activity-7335375115573964800-WC2r","title":"Samsung to invest in Perplexity, integrate AI tech","content":"Samsung plans to integrate Perplexity's technology into its upcoming smartphones, including preloading the startup's app and assistant and","score":0.650934,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.82,"request_id":"5ca80b4b-a80a-4f9e-a580-21cbd2005205"}
